title: Create creative management system for Amazon marketing agency

requirements.text: Create a backend data model to store creative projects with fields: title, description, completion date, Amazon upload date, and associated image URLs

quotes: i need to provide dates when the given creatives will be done and another date when it will be uploaded on amazon

acceptanceCriteria: Data model includes all required fields for tracking creative projects
System can store and retrieve multiple creative projects
Dates are stored in a format that allows proper sorting and filtering

requirements.text: Implement backend endpoints to create, read, update, and delete creative projects

quotes: i have to give a team what i have created till now

acceptanceCriteria: Can add new creative projects with all metadata
Can retrieve list of all creative projects
Can update existing creative project details
Can delete creative projects

requirements.text: Implement image upload functionality allowing users to upload creative images as static assets, storing references in the creative project records

quotes: I also should be able to add images or creatives that i have made

acceptanceCriteria: Users can upload image files through the interface
Uploaded images are stored as static assets in frontend/public/assets
Image references are associated with specific creative projects
Uploaded images can be viewed and displayed

requirements.text: Create a dashboard view displaying all creative projects in a grid or list format, showing title, both dates (completion and Amazon upload), and thumbnail images

quotes: i have to give a team what i have created till now

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays all creative projects
Each project shows completion date and Amazon upload date clearly
Thumbnail images are visible for each project
Layout is organized and easy to scan

requirements.text: Implement a form interface to add new creative projects with fields for title, description, completion date, Amazon upload date, and image upload

quotes: i need to provide dates when the given creatives will be done and another date when it will be uploaded on amazon
I also should be able to add images or creatives that i have made

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all required input fields
Date pickers are provided for both date fields
Image upload interface is intuitive
Form validates inputs before submission
Successfully added projects appear in the dashboard

requirements.text: Implement detailed view for individual creative projects showing full image, all metadata, and edit/delete actions
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a project opens detailed view
Full-size creative image is displayed
All project metadata is visible
Edit and delete actions are available
Changes are reflected immediately in the dashboard

requirements.text: Design and implement a sophisticated, professional visual theme with elegant typography, refined color palette (avoiding blue and purple), refined spacing, and polished UI components that convey professionalism suitable for an agency setting

quotes: i need the UI to be classy and good

acceptanceCriteria: Visual design feels polished and professional
Typography choices are refined and readable
Color scheme is sophisticated and cohesive
Spacing and layout create a premium feel
UI components have consistent styling throughout

constraints: Must use single-actor Motoko backend architecture
Cannot modify immutable frontend paths including hooks and UI components
Must use React, Tailwind CSS, and React Query for frontend
nonGoals: Integration with Amazon's actual API or services
User authentication or multi-user access control
